title: [ExportVerilog] Spill variable assigned but not declared

features.name: multiple large concat operations feeding into OR in initial block
features.description: Code should include multiple comb.concat operations with 12 operands each, whose results are combined via bitwise OR, with the OR result assigned in an initial block

features.name: temp variable spill pattern with undeclared variable reference
features.description: Code should include an initial block with automatic logic temporary variables where a spilled variable is used in an assignment without being declared first

features.name: register with procedural assignment in initial block
features.description: Code should include a procedural assignment to a register within an initial block, combined with temporary variable expressions
